raw_idea: Idea is to make icecream cones in form of traingular waffle

analysis.idea_summary: Creating ice cream cones shaped like triangular waffles.
core_flaws: The shape may not hold ice cream as effectively as traditional cones.
Triangular design could complicate production and increase costs without significant consumer demand.
hidden_assumptions: Consumers will prefer a triangular shape over the traditional cone.
The triangular waffle will provide a better eating experience.
improvement_directions: Conduct market research to gauge consumer interest in the triangular design.
Experiment with the structural integrity of the triangular waffle to ensure it can hold ice cream without leaking.
Consider flavor variations or fillings that could enhance the appeal of the triangular waffle.
analysis.brutal_truth: While the idea of a triangular waffle cone is somewhat novel, it lacks a strong differentiation from existing products and may not provide any substantial benefit to consumers. Focus on addressing the practicalities of production and consumer preferences before proceeding.

analysis.idea_summary: A mobile app that connects people for spontaneous outdoor activities based on their current location and interests.
core_flaws: The concept lacks a unique selling proposition compared to existing platforms.
User engagement may be low due to the spontaneous nature of the activities.
Safety concerns when meeting strangers for outdoor activities.
hidden_assumptions: People are willing to meet strangers for spontaneous activities.
Users have the time and flexibility to engage in spontaneous outdoor activities.
The app can effectively match users based on interests and location.
improvement_directions: Consider adding features that enhance safety, such as user verification or group activities.
Incorporate a gamification element to encourage user engagement and retention.
Explore partnerships with local businesses or outdoor gear companies for promotions.
analysis.brutal_truth: This idea is not novel enough to stand out in a crowded market, and the feasibility is questionable due to safety and engagement issues. You need to rethink the concept to provide a unique angle or additional value that existing apps do not offer.
